overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective from a flying vehicle navigating through Night City's dense urban canyon at night. The vehicle weaves between neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and complex highway interchanges in a rainy, atmospheric setting.

events.description: flying vehicle passes underneath the red Kabuki district sign

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through narrow neon-lit streets at high speed

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in glowing neon advertisements and signage
tall buildings covered in glowing neon advertisements and signage
large red neon sign with Kabuki text marking the district entrance
tall futuristic buildings forming a narrow urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a flying vehicle speeding through a narrow neon-lit street canyon in Night City. The vehicle approaches and passes under the iconic red Kabuki sign while neon advertisements cover the building walls on both sides. The atmosphere is rainy and hazy with cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: vehicle ascends from street level to aerial view over highway interchange
vehicle banks right while continuing to ascend over the highway system

agents.ego_description: rapidly ascending over a complex multi-level highway system with multiple ramps and overpasses

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway system with ramps and overpasses below
large illuminated corporate sign for Orbital Air on building facade
suspended highway ramps and bridges connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the enclosed street canyon to an open aerial view above a complex highway interchange. As it ascends and banks right, the Kabuki sign falls behind and the sprawling multi-level road network becomes visible below, with the Orbital Air sign visible on a distant building.

events.description: sharp left bank around cylindrical rainbow-lit building
approaching dense holographic advertisement district with giant billboards

agents.ego_description: weaving between skyscrapers with sharp banking maneuvers at high altitude

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical tower wrapped in horizontal rainbow-colored neon light strips
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows
covered pedestrian bridges connecting buildings at high altitude

segments.scene_description: Flying at high altitude between dense skyscrapers, the vehicle executes a sharp left bank around a distinctive cylindrical building wrapped in rainbow neon lights. The scene transitions from the highway zone to a dense urban canyon of high-rise towers connected by elevated walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: holographic advertisement district with giant billboards

events.description: passing large Circus billboard and dense holographic displays on all sides

agents.ego_description: flying through a dense zone of holographic advertisements and commercial signage

entered.detail: massive horizontal billboard displaying Circus advertisement with bright colors
floating holographic displays and 3D advertisements projecting from buildings
large industrial ventilation fans on building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense commercial district filled with massive holographic advertisements and billboards. It passes close to a giant Circus billboard while navigating between buildings adorned with ventilation fans and floating holographic displays that illuminate the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with giant holographic displays

events.description: giant blue holographic jellyfish becomes visible ahead dominating the skyline
sharp right turn near the waterfront hologram

agents.ego_description: making aggressive turns near a massive holographic jellyfish display at the waterfront

entered.detail: massive blue glowing holographic jellyfish floating above the waterfront area
low-rise buildings and platforms along the water's edge
modern high-rises with extensive neon lighting along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide waterfront plaza where a massive blue holographic jellyfish dominates the skyline. The vehicle executes a sharp right turn near this giant hologram, with the open water visible below and futuristic buildings lining the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight that begins in a claustrophobic neon street canyon and gradually expands into a wide, holographic waterfront plaza. It begins by speeding under the red Kabuki sign through a rainy, hazy corridor of advertisements before ascending and banking right to reveal a sprawling, multi-level highway interchange below. The camera then climbs to a high altitude, executing a sharp left bank around a rainbow-lit cylindrical tower as the landscape shifts from the open road network back into a dense cluster of high-rise towers and elevated walkways. As the vehicle dives into a commercial district, it weaves past massive holographic billboards and industrial ventilation fans that illuminate the rainy night. Finally, the scene opens into a vast waterfront area where the vehicle makes a sharp right turn beneath a towering blue holographic jellyfish overlooking the open water.
